_publications._publicationTitle: Multiomic analyses reveal new targets of polycomb repressor complex 2 in Schwann lineage cells and malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: Most genes whose expression changed after the loss of SUZ12 or EED on an NF1-deficient background, 81% and 87%, respectively, were upregulated
details: 81% and 87% of genes were upregulated after loss of SUZ12 or EED respectively on an NF1-deficient background
